source_pr.title: plan: first step of join auto-select.
source_pr.body:
We consider different types of join execution in cbo framework. But we should still refine the cost calculation in the near future.

@zimulala @winoros @lamxTyler PTAL

symptoms: sql: "select * from t t1 join t t2 on t1.a = t2.a order by t1.a", (plan/dag_plan_test.go)
failure_signature: sql: "select * from t t1 join t t2 on t1.a = t2.a order by t1.a", (plan/dag_plan_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: sql: "select * from t t1 join t t2 on t1.a = t2.a order by t1.a", (plan/dag_plan_test.go)

files: executor/distsql.go, executor/join_test.go, executor/new_distsql.go, plan/dag_plan_test.go, plan/logical_plan_builder.go, plan/logical_plans.go, plan/new_physical_plan_builder.go, plan/physical_plans.go, plan/task.go
